fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table where the record that is subject to approval is stored.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the document number copied from the relevant sales or purchase document, such as a purchase order or a sales quote.

fields.name: Sequence No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order of approvers when an approval workflow involves more than one approver.

fields.name: Approval Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code identifying the approval process that is required for the document to be approved. The codes in this field are the codes you have set up in the Approval Codes window.

fields.name: Sender ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who sent the approval request for the document to be approved.

fields.name: Salespers./Purch. Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the salesperson or purchaser that was in the document to be approved. It is not a mandatory field, but is useful if a salesperson or a purchaser responsible for the customer/vendor needs to approve the document before it is sent.

fields.name: Approver ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the user who must approve the document.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the approval status for the entry:

fields.name: Date-Time Sent for Approval
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the time that the document was sent for approval.

fields.name: Last Date-Time Modified
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the approval entry was last modified. If, for example, the document approval is canceled, this field will be updated accordingly.

fields.name: Last Modified By ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the person who last modified the approval entry. If, for example, the document approval is canceled, this field will be updated accordingly.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are comments related to the approval of the document. If you want to read the comments, click the field to open the Comment Sheet window.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the document is due for approval by the approver.

fields.name: Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount (excl. VAT) on the document waiting for approval. The amount is stated in the currency that has been set up for this document.

fields.name: Amount (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total amount (excl. VAT) on the document waiting for approval. The amount is stated in the local currency.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the currency of the amounts on the sales or purchase lines.

fields.name: Approval Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which approvers apply to this approval template.
Select between these options:


Option


Description


Blank

Additional approvers that are set up for this approval template will be used as approvers.


Salesperson/Purchaser

The Salesperson/Purchaser that is entered in the document will determine the approver.


Approver

The user who sends the document for approval will determine the approver.

fields.name: Limit Type
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the type of limit that applies to the approval template:
Approval Limits: If the template applies to a sales document, then the sales amount limit is used, and if it applies to a purchase document, then the purchase amount limit is used.
Credit Limits: This limit applies to sales documents only. If a sales document is created that will put a customer over their credit limit and the document is sent for approval, the program creates an approval entry for each credit limit approver, as well as for any other approvers that are approving based on the amount of the sales document. The credit limit approval will occur before the amount approval.
Request Limits: This limit applies to purchase quotes only. By using the Purchase Request Limit in combination with the Request Amount Approval Limit field in the Approval User Setup window, you can set up a purchase request process for internal purchases in the company. When you send a purchase quote for approval, approval entries for your approvers are created.
No Limits: The approval process uses no limits and results in the program assigning one approver only according to the setup in the User Setup table.

fields.name: Available Credit Limit (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the remaining credit (in LCY) that exists for the customer.

fields.name: Delegation Date Formula
fields.tooltip: Specifies for the posted approval entry when an overdue approval request was automatically delegated to the relevant substitute. The field is filled with the value in the Delegate After field in the Workflow Responses window, translated to a date formula. The date of automatic delegation is then calculated based on the Date-Time Sent for Approval field in the Approval Entries window.

fields.name: Iteration No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of handling iterations that this approval request has reached.
